description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build OSW-OS that runs on push and pull requests to master and develop branches, ignoring changes to markdown files and certain directories. The workflow checks if a build should be skipped based on duplicate actions, and if not, it checks out the repository, determines feature flags, default models, and languages, then uses this information to build OSW-OS in a matrix of configurations with Python 3.10 and PlatformIO.
